questions.question: What is the primary purpose of an industrial robotic arm?

explanations.a: Industrial robotic arms automate repetitive manufacturing tasks.
explanations.b: Gaming is not an industrial application.
explanations.c: Internet browsing is unrelated to robotic automation.
explanations.d: Document storage is not a robotic function.

questions.question: Which component directly interacts with objects in a robotic arm?

explanations.a: The base joint provides rotational movement.
explanations.c: The end effector or gripper handles objects.

questions.question: What does payload represent in robotics?

explanations.a: Color has no relation to payload.
explanations.b: Payload is the weight handled by the robotic arm.
explanations.c: Speed and payload are different parameters.

questions.question: Forward kinematics is used to determine:

explanations.b: Forward kinematics calculates end effector coordinates.
explanations.d: Database size is not part of robotics.

questions.question: What is the role of the base joint?

explanations.a: The base joint provides rotational movement.
explanations.b: Temperature measurement is done by sensors.
explanations.c: Program storage is not its function.

questions.question: Which industrial revolution emphasizes smart manufacturing?

explanations.d: Industry 4.0 emphasizes smart and connected manufacturing.

questions.question: Which parameter can reduce robotic arm accuracy?

explanations.b: High payload can reduce positioning accuracy.

questions.question: What is a common application of industrial robots?

explanations.a: Assembly is a major robotic application.

questions.question: Why is robot health monitoring important?

explanations.a: Health monitoring helps detect issues before failures occur.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of pick-and-place operations?

explanations.d: Report generation is not the primary purpose.
